description:
# Foundation

Core CRDT infrastructure: proto.config loader, libs/crdt workspace package, Automerge document management, and WebSocket sync adapter for Tailscale.

## Phases
1. proto.config Loader
2. libs/crdt Workspace Package
3. Sync Server and Leader Election
title: [Epic] Foundation
